intro: Alpinia officinarum powder, also known as galangal powder, is derived from the rhizome of the Alpinia officinarum plant, commonly found in Southeast Asia. This powder is prized for its pungent aroma and warm, spicy flavor, often used in traditional medicine and as a culinary ingredient in various Asian dishes. Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, galangal powder is believed to offer several health benefits, including digestive aid and immune system support.
